feedback.details: Diagram validates successfully with mmdc (exit code 0) at /tmp/validate.svg. No syntax errors detected.

All 10 required containers present with technology stacks: API Gateway (line 10), Orchestrator Service (line 13), Local Model Adapter (line 16), Frontier Model Adapter (line 17), Nomad Job Definition (line 20), Consul Integration (line 21), Vault Integration (line 22), Prometheus Metrics Exporter (line 23), Langfuse Trace Collector (line 24), AutoResearch Loop Agent (line 27).

All protocols correctly specified: HTTP/1.1 (lines 37-38, 45-47, 57-58, 61), gRPC (lines 41-42), Nomad SDK (line 50), Consul API (line 51), Vault API (line 52), Prometheus PushGateway (line 53), Langfuse API (line 54).

CRITICAL terminology violations: (1) Line 13 uses 'Orchestrator Service' instead of mandated 'Real-time Routing Container'. (2) Line 27 uses 'AutoResearch Loop Agent' instead of mandated 'Offline Self-Learning Container'. (3) Line 30 labels Nomad as 'Nomad Manager/Client' instead of required 'Nomad Cluster: 3 nodes'. OpenAI-compatible endpoints (/v1/chat/completions line 37, /v1/embeddings line 38) correctly present.

Critical gaps: (1) Line 17 Frontier Model Adapter shows 'HTTP client' but missing required 'vLLM/llama.cpp' integration label. (2) 'Telemetry: GPU/CPU metrics' label completely absent from diagram. (3) Line 13 shows '1B' but not explicit '1B parameter model' text. Present: background agent annotation (line 27), Docker annotations (all containers), NormStat/VecStat (line 13).

CRITICAL: Legend is completely MISSING. Criterion requires 'legend present explaining symbols (solid arrows = synchronous, dashed = asynchronous)' but no legend exists. Container descriptions exceed 2 words per line in multiple places (line 13: 'Golang bifrost 1B' is 3 words, line 16: 'vLLM llama.cpp' acceptable as compound term). Static structure maintained.

All infrastructure components present with correct labels: Nomad 'Nomad Manager/Client' (line 30), Consul 'Consul Service Mesh' (line 31), Vault 'Vault Secrets Store' (line 32), Prometheus 'Prometheus Server' (line 33), Langfuse 'Langfuse Backend' (line 34).

Correct dependency flow: llm-switch containers initiate calls to external infrastructure (Nomad line 50, Consul line 51, Vault line 52). No arrows originate from infrastructure back to llm-switch containers. Health check properly labeled '/health' (line 58).

Gaps: (1) External API connections lack 'TLS 1.3' or 'HTTPS' annotation - no external HTTPS connection shown. Vault shows [secrets] (line 22) ✓. Internal mesh shows 'mTLS via Consul Connect' (lines 37-61) ✓.
All required patterns present: Circuit Breaker (lines 37-38), Error Response paths (lines 45-46), Fallback to Local Model (line 47).

All routes present: '/v1/chat/completions' (line 37), '/v1/embeddings' (line 38), '/health' (line 58), '/metrics' (line 57). Routes are labeled on diagram relationships. Minor deduction for potential ambiguity in routing semantics.

CRITICAL: Constraint labeling is consolidated in Nomad Job Definition description (line 20) rather than distributed as container-specific annotations. Missing: (1) 'GPU required' label on Frontier Model Adapter (line 17). (2) 'Memory: 32GB' label on Local Model Adapter (line 16). (3) 'Node pool: llm-switch' annotation on all containers. Criterion requires 'visible as labels or annotations' per container, not just in a description block.

overall_summary: The c2-container.md architecture demonstrates strong structural foundations with valid Mermaid syntax (mmdc exit 0), complete container inventory (10 containers), and correct protocol specifications. However, it contains three critical failures preventing production deployment: (1) PRD Section 4.2 terminology violations using 'Orchestrator Service' and 'AutoResearch Loop Agent' instead of mandated 'Real-time Routing Container' and 'Offline Self-Learning Container' (lines 13, 27), plus 'Nomad Manager/Client' instead of 'Nomad Cluster: 3 nodes'. (2) Missing C4 legend explaining diagram symbology. (3) Nomad Job Constraints improperly consolidated in descriptions rather than shown as container-specific annotations (GPU required, Memory 32GB, Node pool labels missing from individual containers). Additional high-severity gaps include missing hardware telemetry integration point ('Telemetry: GPU/CPU metrics' absent), missing vLLM/llama.cpp label on Frontier Model Adapter, and missing external HTTPS/TLS 1.3 security annotations. Error handling paths (Circuit Breaker, Error Response, Fallback) and dependency direction validation are fully compliant.
